form-completer.description: Happy-path wellness symptom poster: lands on ourHeart, clicks Post Symptoms CTA, fills the strict-validation form with canonical valid values (username starts with letter + has digit + 8+ chars, age 18-100, duration matches '<n> days|hours|weeks' regex, symptoms 50-500 chars with sentence-ending punctuation), submits cleanly. Story: clean form completion that bypasses the over-strict validation friction. Dashboard: wellness submit funnel landing -> Post Symptoms click -> Form Submitted, Form Validation Failed=0 cohort.

actions.text: My head hurts and I feel dizzy when I stand up. Help.
